## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, and `go test ./...` pass (backend).
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass (frontend).
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant.
- [ ] I added tests for new behaviour where it makes sense.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data are included.
